title: Update module github.com/opencontainers/cgroups to v0.0.8
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/cgroups (github.com/opencontainers/cgroups)</summary>

### [`v0.0.8`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/releases/tag/v0.0.8)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.7...v0.0.8)

#### What's Changed

- getallpids: Ignore removed cgroups by [@​halaney](https://redirect.github.com/halaney) in [#​67](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/67)
- v2: set memory.oom.group => OOMPolicy in systemd by [@​tych0](https://redirect.github.com/tych0) in [#​41](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/41)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​63](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/63)
- build(deps): bump actions/cache from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​65](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/65)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​68](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/68)

#### New Contributors

- [@​tych0](https://redirect.github.com/tych0) made their first contribution in [#​41](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/41)
- [@​halaney](https://redirect.github.com/halaney) made their first contribution in [#​67](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/pull/67)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/opencontainers/cgroups/compare/v0.0.7...v0.0.8>

</details>
